name: Google Sheets
description: Everything an agent needs to work with Google Sheets: the connector (install → Connect Google → read/write spreadsheets) plus a usage skill teaching A1 notation, read-before-write, and the values vs batchUpdate operations. Recommended way to add Sheets.
setup:
This bundle installs the **Google Sheets connector** and its **usage skill** together. After installing, click **Connect Google** to authorize your account (one consent screen for the `spreadsheets` scope) and the agent can read and write spreadsheets it has access to.

**Operators:** the connector needs a Google OAuth client configured on the control plane (`EDEN_GOOGLE_CLIENT_ID` / `EDEN_GOOGLE_CLIENT_SECRET`, redirect URI `<origin>/google/callback`) — see the Google Sheets connector's setup notes for the Google Cloud steps and the publishing-status/verification ladder.
